task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template to extract all Lambda function logical IDs and their runtime versions
solution_criteria: Solution should correctly identify and return a dictionary mapping Lambda logical IDs to their runtime values from a CloudFormation JSON/YAML structure

task: Create a JSON IAM policy that allows read-only access to all S3 buckets with names starting with 'prod-'
solution_criteria: Solution must be valid JSON with correct IAM policy structure, appropriate Action statements, and Resource wildcards that match 'prod-*' buckets

task: Write a regex pattern to match and validate AWS EC2 instance IDs from log files
solution_criteria: Pattern should accurately match AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i-followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters) and not match invalid formats
